references.role: global Licorn kitchen identity for all Seedance segments
references.prompt: Use only to preserve the Licorn kitchen surfaces, island material, lighting, and final hero-shot environment. Do not force a wide shot when the prompt asks for macro food detail.

references.role: overhead island reference for tortilla assembly and pan topology
references.prompt: Use only for top-down countertop framing, clean island surface, and readable assembly geometry.

references.role: induction cooktop context for sauteing the filling
references.prompt: Use only for dark induction surface and close saute pan context. No flames, no burner glow.

references.role: open oven context for dish insertion
references.prompt: Use only for the already-open oven and rack context during the baking transition.

references.role: oven close-up for bubbling baked reveal
references.prompt: Use only for warm oven close-up lighting and baked surface reveal.

references.role: Licorn character identity for visible hands and final satisfied hero
references.prompt: Use only to preserve character identity. Do not redesign the character.
Use only for a warm satisfied expression in the final hero shot.

references.role: top-down visible hands for sauce spreading, filling, rolling, and garnish
references.prompt: Use only for readable hands entering from frame edges during top-down food actions.
Use only for the final hero shot with the character visible beside the dish.

references.role: spoon shape for sauce coating, sauce spreading, and filling placement
references.prompt: Use only as a spoon reference. The spoon must be held by a visible hand when moving food.

references.role: spatula shape for final enchilada lift
references.prompt: Use only for the final serving lift; keep the enchilada supported and intact.

references.role: homemade red enchilada sauce viscosity and chile color
references.prompt: Generate a macro food reference of smooth glossy brick-red enchilada sauce coating the back of a spoon, medium viscosity, light steam, chile-colored rather than tomato-soup orange, no text, no brand packaging.

references.role: cooked chicken chile bean filling texture
references.prompt: Generate a close-up reference of cooked enchilada filling: opaque diced chicken cubes with lightly browned edges, glossy softened onion, green chile flecks, whole black beans, moist but not soupy, in a saute pan.

references.role: parallel rolled flour tortilla geometry in rectangular baking dish
references.prompt: Generate an overhead reference of a rectangular baking dish filled with parallel rolled flour tortilla enchiladas, open-ended cylinders, seams mostly tucked underneath, pale tortillas still visible, no sauce covering yet.

references.role: unbaked pan after red sauce and shredded cheese topping
references.prompt: Generate an overhead reference of the same rectangular enchilada pan covered with glossy red enchilada sauce and scattered shredded cheese, with shallow roll ridges still visible under the sauce, not flat like lasagna.

Generate a close-up reference of baked chicken enchiladas in a rectangular dish: bubbling melted cheese, browned freckles, glossy red sauce pockets, crisp tortilla edges peeking through, steam, roll ridges still readable.

Generate a finished enchilada pan reference with red sauce, melted cheese, cilantro, avocado cubes, red onion, crema ribbons, and cotija crumbles; fresh toppings stay in stable clusters and do not hide the baked surface.

references.role: final served enchilada lift with controlled cheese pull
references.prompt: Generate a final serving reference of one saucy chicken enchilada portion lifted on a spatula from the baking dish, controlled stretchy melted cheese, red sauce trails, steam, tortilla intact, garnish visible, no tearing mess.
